step_rationale: Platelet and lymphocyte adaptor protein; aggregation signaling and leukocyte cross-talk.
mechanism: SAP mediates platelet activation and platelet–leukocyte aggregation, amplifying thrombotic and inflammatory responses during acute coronary thrombosis.

references.title: Multiomics uncover the proinflammatory role ofdeletion after myocardial infarction in mice.
references.journal: American journal of physiology. Heart and circulatory physiology

references.title: Platelet aggregation induces platelet aggregate stability via SLAM family receptor signaling.
